plan_description: Reads a Google Sheets leads tracker, filters to Stage = 4 leads, summarizes each lead’s Notes into two bullets, and emails a single HTML table summary to you and your marketing manager.

data: - Read lead rows from the Google Sheets spreadsheet with ID "1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE".
- Read lead rows from the sheet tab named "Leads".
- Read the leads data from the A1 range "Leads!A1:H10".
- Treat the first row of the selected range as the header row.
- Use the header row to locate the columns named exactly: "Stage", "Notes", "Date", "Lead Name", "Company", "Email", and "Sales Person".
actions: - Identify the column whose header is exactly "Stage".
- Filter to rows where the Stage cell value is the numeric value 4 (do not match text like "4" or values like "4 - Qualified").
- For each filtered row, read the cell under the column header exactly "Notes".
- For each filtered row, generate a two-bullet summary of that Notes text.
- If a filtered row has an empty Notes cell, output an empty Notes summary for that lead (do not invent content).
- Build a single combined list of all filtered leads to include in one email.
output: - Produce a single HTML summary table containing all filtered (Stage = 4) leads.
- Include table columns in this order: "Date", "Lead Name", "Company", "Email", "Sales Person", "Notes summary".
- In the "Notes summary" cell for each lead, include exactly two bullet points when Notes text exists.
- If there are zero Stage = 4 leads, produce an HTML email body that clearly states: no qualified leads (Stage = 4) were found in the selected range.
delivery: - Send one email to the following recipients (To): "meiribarak@gmail.com", "offir.omer@gmail.com".
- Email body must include the HTML output (no attachment).
- Use the email subject: "Qualified leads (Stage 4) summary".
processing_steps: - Read the specified range from the "Leads" tab.
- Convert the returned rows into structured lead objects using the header row.
- Filter lead objects where Stage equals numeric 4.
- Summarize each lead’s Notes into two bullets.
- Send the email to both recipients.

resolved_user_inputs.value: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Sales Person
